ClearCloud Personal Storage

Terms of Service

Effective date: May 1, 2026

These demo terms are written for a classroom product demonstration and are not real legal advice.

1. Plain-Language Summary

We provide simple cloud storage for personal files.

You keep ownership of your content.

We only use your files to provide, protect, and improve the service.

We give clear notice before material terms change.

2. Account Responsibilities

You are responsible for keeping your password safe.

You may close your account at any time from your dashboard.

We will provide a reasonable export option before permanent account deletion.

3. Your Content

You own the files, notes, images, and documents that you upload to ClearCloud.

You grant us a limited license to store, transmit, back up, and display your content only as needed to operate the service for you.

We do not claim ownership of your content.

We do not sell your private files to advertisers, brokers, or unrelated third parties.

4. Privacy and Data Sharing

We collect account information, usage logs, and support messages needed to run the service.

We share personal data only with processors who help us provide hosting, support, security, and payment processing.

We require processors to protect your data and use it only for ClearCloud service purposes.

You may request access, correction, export, or deletion of your personal data.

5. Billing and Renewal

Paid plans renew monthly or yearly based on the plan you choose.

We will send renewal reminders at least 14 days before annual renewal charges.

You may cancel renewal at any time before the next billing date.

If we raise prices, we will give at least 30 days of notice before the new price applies.

6. Changes to the Service

We may improve features, fix bugs, or update security controls over time.

If a material change reduces your rights, we will notify you before it takes effect.

If you do not accept a material change, you may export your files and cancel before the change applies.

7. Disputes

Before filing a legal claim, both sides agree to try informal resolution for 30 days.

You may bring claims in your local small claims court if the claim qualifies.

We do not require forced arbitration for consumer disputes.

We do not require users to waive class action rights.

8. Liability

We work to keep ClearCloud reliable, secure, and available.

We are responsible for losses caused by our fraud, willful misconduct, or gross negligence.

For ordinary service issues, our liability is limited to the fees you paid us in the previous 12 months.

9. Suspension and Termination

We may suspend accounts that abuse the service, violate the law, or threaten platform security.

When practical, we will provide notice and a chance to fix the issue before termination.

After termination, we will keep export access available for 30 days unless legally prohibited.

10. Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to legal-demo@clearcloud.example.

We aim to respond to policy questions within 10 business days.
